case_title: STAR GLASS COMPANY INC. VS REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAR GLASS COMPANY INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,089.25 FILED BY STAR GLASS COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,585.00 FILED BY REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STAR GLASS COMPANY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF STAR GLASS COMPANY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT REYES GILBERT IND & DBA PROTECTIVE FINISHES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STAR GLASS COMPANY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
